_comment: Provenance metadata for Soul Lasher / Kunji Whip (坤极鞭). Auto-generated from canon database. Every item answers: Where did this originate? Who made it? When? Why? How old? What cultivation? Current owner? Known history?

abilities: Directly attacks primordial/origin soul at warp speed
